sourceRef.citation: Abd. Rahim, Mukhlis Bakri, Muhammad Ridwan et al. 2026

statement.en: Tinjauan Hukum Islam terhadap Praktik Akad Utang Piutang Uang dengan Pelunasan Barang di Desa Lampasio Kecamatan Lampasio Kabupaten Tolitoli

proposer: Abd. Rahim, Mukhlis Bakri, Muhammad Ridwan

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a legal-theological case study examining Islamic contract law (akad) applied to debt-goods exchange practices in a specific Indonesian village. The axiom is provisional because: (1) it describes empirical social practice not yet formally validated through peer review (preprint status, future date 2026), (2) Islamic jurisprudence on this specific transaction type remains debated across schools of thought (madhabs), (3) the legal conclusion depends on contextual interpretation of riba, ijab-qabul, and gharar principles that are themselves subject to scholarly disagreement. The work is FLOWING rather than BOTH because it makes directional claims toward a conclusion, but that conclusion remains under scholarly validation.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 意図と契約の流動性のなかで、貨幣と物品の等価性が溶解する。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 貨幣と物品の往還は、互いに相手の本質を透かして見つめ合う関係である。
